reviews.author: NgocDung Luong
reviews.text: Đền Hùng is a truly meaningful historical site. The temple complex is located on Nghĩa Lĩnh mountain, surrounded by beautiful nature and peaceful atmosphere. Climbing up the mountain gives a great view, and the air feels fresh and sacred. Visiting here helps me feel connected to Vietnamese roots and the country’s long history. Highly recommend for anyone who loves culture and history.

reviews.author: Hằng
reviews.text: I visited Hung Kings Temple because it's a great historical site to Vietnamese people. I think I will not visit this place again as it's not attractive enough. Moreover, the vendors always insist on soliciting to buy their goods.

reviews.author: Darren Jasmin
reviews.text: A bit scammy. If you ask for directions, someone will show you the way for 30k vnd but would take you around and drive you to his wife’s store who will harass you to buy overpriced drinks and incense. Nothing special.

reviews.author: William
reviews.text: Historic place and so nice to visit but it wasn’t that impressive. It’s basically a hill with a bunch of pagodas. When I got there it was jammed full of people because it was the day before Hung Kings festival.

reviews.author: Nhat Huy
reviews.text: The area is a complex consisting of several temples dedicated to the cult of Hùng Vương: the first descendants and the mythological founders of the Vietnamese, Lạc Long Quân and Âu Cơ.[2] Styled sequentially as Hùng Vương I to Hùng Vương XVIII, the monarchs were the first dynastic rulers of Văn Lang, the primordial kingdom of the Vietnamese. Popular belief designates the Hùng temple as also the site of Văn Lang's capital, Phong Châu. The kingdom is associated with the Đông Sơn culture and the famous bronze drums. For the successive Vietnamese dynasties and states, the Hùng Temples are revered with annual processional festivities known as Giỗ Tổ Hùng Vương held every 10th day of 3rd lunar month.

reviews.author: Diep Lam Van
reviews.text: It is good place to visit, but the government needs to manage the shops in front of temple to avoid unwanting services.

reviews.author: Lloyd-Lee Kemertgoglou (KruLloyd)
reviews.text: What a truly old and magical place. Dating back at least 2700BC. The Temples are in superb condition and the historic sights are incredibly clean. I would suggest anyone passing through Viet Tri, take a day off and spend it visiting this amazing place

reviews.author: Vince ksg
reviews.text: Free entry for now but 10k for the electric car to send you to the foot of the hill where you ascend to the 4 temples. There's also a museum at the foot of the hill. Very popular with locals but not with foreigners.

reviews.author: Giang Thu
reviews.text: Majestic atmosphere. Ancient structure. Conserved jungle of tropical trees. Good security. Various cuisine

reviews.author: Trúc Thư Văn
reviews.text: Be careful with the Kiosk No.15 - on the left side when you go down. Cause the service is so bad and as a trick, they told me that when you wanna be back the gate, just come here and the drivers wait for u. But actually, it is a souvenir shop and they JUST WANNA SELL YOU GOODS, they told that wait here and they guide you the exit. But, the gate is on the right side and you can find it by yourself. If you dont visit the shop, they YELL AT YOU !

reviews.author: Pham Ba Viet
reviews.text: A great historical place. This is original point of Vietnamese nation with Hung Kings Empire.

reviews.author: Minh Nguyen
reviews.text: Beautiful temple complex, really fills you with awe and respect for the ancestors

reviews.author: Nguyễn Xuân Đại
reviews.text: Good temple for new year visiting

reviews.author: Simple Life
reviews.text: A place to know how our country was fromed, and the service is very good!!!

reviews.author: Melanie Blackler
reviews.text: Temples are exquisite inside. The climb is a challange.

reviews.author: Sac Bui Nguyen
reviews.text: Hùng temple, locating on Nghĩa Lĩnh mountain, Cổ Tích village, Hy Cương commune, Phong Châu district, Phú Thọ province, is considered[by whom?] the most sacred of the historic sites by the Vietnamese. The area is a complex consisting of several temples dedicated to the cult of Hùng Vương - the first descendants the mythological founders of the Vietnamese, Lạc Long Quân and Âu Cơ. Styled sequentially as Hung Vuong I to Hung Vuong XVIII, the monarchs were the first dynastic rulers of Van Lang, the primordial kingdom of the Vietnamese. Popular belief designates the Hùng temple as also the site of Van Lang's capital, Phong Châu. The kingdom is associated with the Đông Sơn culture and the famous bronze drums. For the successive Vietnamese dynasties and states, the Hùng Temples are revered with annual processional festivities known as Giỗ Tổ Hùng Vương held every 10th day of 3rd lunar month. *** Đền Hùng là tên gọi khái quát của Khu di tích lịch sử Đền Hùng - quần thể đền chùa thờ phụng các Vua Hùng và tôn thất của nhà vua trên núi Nghĩa Lĩnh, gắn với Giỗ Tổ Hùng Vương - Lễ hội Đền Hùng được tổ chức tại địa điểm đó hàng năm vào ngày 10 tháng 3 âm lịch. Hiện nay, theo các tài liệu khoa học đã công bố đa số đều thống nhất nền móng kiến trúc đền Hùng bắt đầu được xây dựng từ thời vua Đinh Tiên Hoàng trị vì. Đến thời Hậu Lê (thế kỷ 15) được xây dựng hoàn chỉnh theo quy mô như hiện tại. (Wikipedia)

reviews.author: Hong Thai Vo
reviews.text: The oldest temple in Vietnam. This temple is worship Hung Kings, 18 Kings, the first kings in Vietnam history. Every year, on Mar 10 Lunar year, nearly 1 million Vietnamese come here to pay respects. On this hill, there are 3 temple from low to peak. Nowadays, the Mar 10 Lunar is the national holiday. It take about 2 to 3 hours to visit here.

reviews.author: SH. Jeon
reviews.text: Short hiking Wt beautiful views

reviews.author: ms jung
reviews.text: It is a great honor to come to Den Hung Temple, a symbol of the Vietnamese people. It was a good trip.

reviews.author: YoungSik Kim 김영식
reviews.text: Very meaningful place for vietnamese. The founder of Viet Kingdom, Hung Vuong (King) and his 18 follow on King's temple located here which is around BC 2900 years ago.

reviews.author: Nguyen Dinh Thanh
reviews.text: A place to visit to explore more information of history of Vietnam.

reviews.author: Jong-gon Lee
reviews.text: This site is one of historical place where 1st King regional area in Vietnam. I was so touched and felt by old ancient stories in this place.

reviews.author: Linh Vu
reviews.text: Traditional temples of Hung king. Founder of the nation

reviews.author: Can Pham
reviews.text: This temple is designed for local Vietnamese who worship the country's founding kings.
